options.name: -count
options.description: Return the number of times this message has been issued this session.

options.name: -detail
options.description: Returns the message of specified id.

options.name: -id
options.description: A single message ID, in the form "ENCFOO-123".

options.name: -limit
options.description: Return the limit for the specified message as an integer. -1 is unlimited. 0 is suppressed.

options.name: -long
options.description: Return the long message description, as used for the Description section in "man <msgID>"

options.name: -on_error
options.description: Return the error action for the specified message.

options.name: -severity
options.description: Return the severity of the specified message as a string. One of "error warn info default"

options.name: -short
options.description: Return the short message description. Equivalent to "help <msgID>"

options.name: -stop_script_limit
options.description: Returns the message limit allowed for every public command. -1 is unlimited.

options.name: -suppress
options.description: Return 1 if the message is suppressed, 0 otherwise.
